story.intro: Hey there I'm Marty. Managing this floor for the last 32 years.
story.headline: Dispatch 1
story.chapterStart: See! Easy as that! Let's keep on shipping.
story.completion: Farm wagons. Wagons? For a computer brand? This doesn't add up.
story.funFact: Cow chips. Dried cow manure. Caked in the sun. Flipped for a month, then thrown for distance. Forty-three years running. State records 248 feet. Only in Wisconsin.

clues.text: See! Easy as that! Let's keep on shipping.
That's the way. Keep those packages moving.
You're getting the hang of this. Stay sharp.
Nice work. This floor runs smooth when the routes are clear.
Almost done with this batch. Keep it up.
Good hustle. Just a few more to go.
All packages loaded! Another dispatch cleared.
